articles.title: Finance Briefing: Inflation’s Grip Persists into the Holiday Weekend and Its Ripple Effects on Markets
articles.summary: The latest data shows that inflationary pressures remain stubbornly high as Americans head into the Memorial Day weekend, with price increases most pronounced in food, fuel, and household goods. While consumers feel the pinch, the market landscape continues to evolve: retirement savings gains offer unexpected benefits,

articles.title: Technology Briefing: Coding’s Future, the Steroid Olympics, and AI‑Driven Science
articles.summary: In this briefing we examine how recent developments—from Anthropic’s Code with Claude to Google I/O’s AI‑science roadmap—are reshaping software platforms, human enhancement, and climate technology. articles.title: AI Briefing: Hackers are learning to exploit chatbot 'personalities'
articles.summary: A quieter look at why chatbot persona attacks matter: the weak point is not only the model, but the operational promises wrapped around it.
